title: hopea paucinervis
intro: Hopea paucinervis, also known as the white sandalwood tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hopea paucinervis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
